name: sidecar-connect
title: Sidecar Connect
description: Connect and manage Sidecar devices directly from Raycast.
author: dejuknow

commands.name: toggle
commands.title: Toggle Sidecar
commands.description: Connect or disconnect your preferred Sidecar device

commands.name: manage-displays
commands.title: Manage Sidecar
commands.description: Browse devices, connect, disconnect, and manage favorites

commands.name: quick-connect
commands.title: Quick Connect Sidecar
commands.description: Connect to your default or favorite Sidecar device

preferences.name: defaultDevice
preferences.title: Default Device
preferences.description: iPad name for Toggle and Quick Connect (e.g. "My iPad")
